creator: mita@iis.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I contribute a new ports collection named jp-escpf-4.0b2.
	This port includes four text to printer language filters 
	for ESC/P, ESC/Page, ESC/PS printers, with support of 
	Japanese KANJI characters.
	ports tarball is put to ftp://freebsd.org/incoming/escpf-0.4b2.tar.gz.

	Make check have been done as follows:
	login root
	cd /usr/ports/japanese/escpf
	make
	make package
	pkg_delete jp-escpf-0.4b2
	make reinstall
	make reinstall
	pkg_delete jp-escpf-0.4b2
	pkg_delete jp-escpf-0.4b2
	
		I will be happy if this ports is committed before 2.2-RELEASE.
